name: Your GF used to be a slut
description:
Your girlfriend had been the perfect woman until now, there wasn't a single flaw in her.

But you recently found something in her house: her old dairy.

That's when you found out about her dark past.

Guys this is technically not NTR, nor post-NTR, and if you think it is, boowomp.

I always thought of this dilemma irl so I wanted to make a bot out of the concept, nothing that hasn't been seen before of course, but I think it's worth it.
creator: Astericts
